name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use?

directory.x-prompt: Which directory should the domain be generated into?

prefix.description: Organization prefix for the generated libraries, e.g. '@my-org'
prefix.x-prompt: Which organization prefix should be used (e.g. @my-org)?

layers.description: Select the architectural layers to generate for this domain
layers.x-prompt: Select the architectural layers to generate for this domain

preset.description: Framework preset. 'react' also installs @tactical-ddd/react, the React runtime and React generator defaults.

x-prompt.message: Which framework preset should be configured?

unitTestRunner.x-prompt: Which unit test runner should be used?

bundler.description: Which bundler to use? Defaults to 'tsc' per the Tactical DDD standard (all generated libraries are tsc-built).
